results.title: Fed interest rate decision April 2026: Fed holds rates steady amid dissent
Federal Reserve Board - Federal Reserve issues FOMC statement
Fed meeting recap: Powell to stay on board – Trump's legal attacks have 'left me no choice'
US Fed holds rates steady, Powell to remain on its board
Fed holds interest rates steady for third straight meeting, as Powell vows to remain as governor - CBS News
Fed live updates: Trump says 'I don't care' that Chair Powell is staying at the Fed

summary: FOMC on April 29, 2026 held federal funds rate at 3.5%-3.75% with an unusually divided 8-4 vote (most dissents since Oct 1992). Powell will remain on the Fed board after chairmanship ends May 15; Warsh nomination advancing. Inflation elevated partly due to Middle East energy prices; labor market stagnant.
